name: Cash Loans Bear
description_short: Cash Loans Bear offers payday and installment loans up to $5,000 with same-day approval at 45 U.S. locations. No credit check required; APR up to 33%.
description_long:
Cash Loans Bear is a multi-location emergency lending company operating 45 branches across the United States, with a physical office in St. Charles, MD at 1216 Smallwood Dr W. The company positions itself as a fast-access lender for consumers facing unexpected financial emergencies who need same-day or next-day funding. Founded to serve borrowers regardless of credit history, Cash Loans Bear has established a retail lending model with extended hours (8 AM–10 PM daily) to maximize accessibility.

The company offers two primary loan products: payday loans ranging from $100–$1,000 with 14–31 day terms at up to 33% APR, and installment loans up to $5,000 repayable over 2–48 months at approximately 24–33% APR. Both products are marketed as no-collateral, no-document loans with approval based primarily on current income verification rather than credit history. The payday loan example provided shows a $500 loan at 28% APR with a $15 finance charge over 14 days, resulting in $515 total repayment.

Cash Loans Bear differentiates itself through same-day funding capability, physical retail locations for in-person service, flexible eligibility (accepts borrowers with credit scores as low as 600), and simplified application processes that do not require extensive documentation. The company emphasizes transparent fee disclosure and plain-language explanations of loan terms. Customer testimonials highlight quick approval timelines and accessibility to borrowers with employment gaps or poor credit histories.

However, consumers should note that APR rates reach the ceiling allowable under Maryland state lending law (up to 33%), making these products expensive relative to traditional bank loans or credit union alternatives. The short payday loan terms create refinancing risk if repayment proves difficult. While the company markets loans as "no credit check," general credit inquiries may occur. These are high-cost emergency products best suited for short-term cash shortfalls, not ongoing financial needs.
address: 1216 Smallwood Dr W, St Charles, MD 20603

company_info.headquarters: 1216 Smallwood Dr W, St Charles, MD 20603

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available; no multi-day waiting period
Physical locations at 45 U.S. branches including St. Charles, MD for in-person service
No collateral or documentation required; simplified application process
Approves borrowers with poor credit (testimonial shows approval with 600 credit score)
Extended hours (8 AM–10 PM daily, including weekends) for accessibility
Transparent fee structure disclosed upfront; payday loan finance charge is $2.75 per $100
Flexible loan terms: payday loans 14–31 days; installment loans up to 48 months
cons: APR rates reach 33%, the maximum allowed under Maryland law; significantly more expensive than bank loans or credit unions
Short 14–31 day payday loan terms create high refinancing and rollover risk if borrowers cannot repay in full
Finance charges compound quickly on small loans; $500 payday loan costs $15 in 14 days (28% APR)
Installment loans still carry 24–33% APR, limiting their value as a longer-term alternative to credit cards
No mention of payment plan flexibility, hardship options, or loan modification if borrower faces financial stress
best_for: Borrowers with urgent short-term cash needs ($100–$500) who cannot wait 3–5 business days for bank approval
Consumers with poor or no credit history unable to access traditional bank loans or credit cards
Workers with irregular or non-traditional income (gig economy, self-employed) who can demonstrate current ability to repay
Individuals facing one-time emergencies (car repair, medical bill) who can repay the full loan within 14–31 days
diagnosis: Cash Loans Bear is best suited for borrowers facing genuine short-term emergencies who cannot access traditional bank loans and can repay within 14–31 days. The primary caveat is that APR rates (up to 33%) make these products expensive; borrowers should exhaust alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans, credit cards) before using payday loans, and should never treat them as recurring debt solutions.
services: Payday loans up to $1,000 with 14–31 day terms
Installment loans up to $5,000 with 2–48 month repayment
In-person loan application at physical retail branches
No credit history check required (income-based approval)
In-store guidance on loan selection and terms
Customer support via phone and email
